title: VDD: extract_response_text and extract_token_usage duplicate ProviderAdapter response parsing — stovepipe
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Dimension: DRY / Architectural Alignment. Location: src/vdd/parsing.rs:116-213 (extract_response_text, extract_token_usage). Violation: These functions hardcode OpenAI/Anthropic/Google response shapes inside VDD. The ProviderAdapter trait in providers.rs already exists to normalize responses across providers. By rolling its own extraction, VDD diverges silently: a new provider (DeepSeek, Qwen, Z.AI) works with the main proxy but returns empty text + zero tokens for VDD. The dup also misses Gemini's cachedContentTokenCount format variance that providers.rs may already handle. Mandated Refactor: Add trait methods on ProviderAdapter: extract_response_text(&Value) -> String and extract_token_usage(&Value) -> TokenUsage. Call through the adapter in send_to_adversary / send_to_builder. Delete the duplicate parsing code.
